items.title_en: The World Cup will likely be the biggest gambling event in history
items.title_zh: 世界杯可能是历史上最大的赌博赛事
items.desc_en: Global wagers on the 2026 World Cup could top $50 billion, according to Macquarie analyst Chad Beynon. That’s up from more than $35 billion in the 2022 tournament.
items.desc_zh: 麦格理 (Macquarie) 分析师查德·贝农 (Chad Beynon) 表示，2026 年世界杯的全球赌注可能超过 500 亿美元。这高于 2022 年锦标赛的超过 350 亿美元。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran will 'pay the price' and claims they have 'taken too long' to agree to a deal
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示伊朗将“付出代价”并声称他们“花了太长时间”才同意达成协议
items.desc_en: The president's comments came after U.S. forces on Tuesday evening launched strikes against Iran.
items.desc_zh: 总统发表上述言论之前，美国军队周二晚上对伊朗发动了袭击。

items.title_en: Trump and Iran trade new threats after strikes exchanged
items.title_zh: 特朗普和伊朗在相互攻击后交换了新的威胁
items.desc_en: The US president warns Iran "will have to pay the price" for taking too long to agree a deal, after Tehran vows retaliation to any attacks.
items.desc_zh: 在德黑兰誓言对任何袭击进行报复后，美国总统警告伊朗“将不得不付出代价”，因为花了太长时间才达成协议。

items.title_en: Ukraine says missiles hit military plant deep inside Russia
items.title_zh: 乌克兰称导弹袭击了俄罗斯境内的军事工厂
items.desc_en: Ukraine's military also says it has struck a Russian oil refinery and a "shadow fleet" oil tanker in the Black Sea.
items.desc_zh: 乌克兰军方还表示，它袭击了黑海的一家俄罗斯炼油厂和一艘“影子舰队”油轮。

items.title_en: Gold, silver and bitcoin fall as traders up Fed rate hike bets
items.title_zh: 随着交易员加大美联储加息押注，黄金、白银和比特币下跌
items.desc_en: Precious metals were firmly in negative territory, as fears about inflation and the Federal Reserve's interest rate path weighed on investor sentiment.
items.desc_zh: 由于对通胀和美联储利率走势的担忧打压了投资者情绪，贵金属牢牢处于负值区域。

items.title_en: Two reasons for optimism after Tuesday's whipsaw market sell-off
items.title_zh: 周二市场大幅抛售后乐观的两个理由
items.desc_en: There's reason for optimism, judging by bullish options flows around stocks that do better when interest-rates stay lower, and call-buyers who are prepared for the biggest move in Oracle since Covid.
items.desc_zh: 从在利率保持较低时表现更好的股票周围的看涨期权流动以及为甲骨文自新冠疫情以来最大走势做好准备的看涨期权买家来看，我们有理由感到乐观。

items.title_zh: 美国宇航局任命阿尔忒弥斯月球计划的下一任宇航员
items.desc_en: Nasa names its next Artemis crew, though they will not be walking on the Moon or even going anywhere near it.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局任命了下一批阿尔忒弥斯宇航员，尽管他们不会在月球上行走，甚至不会去任何靠近月球的地方。

items.title_en: SpaceX IPO explained: The price is set, but retail allocation still up in the air
items.title_zh: SpaceX IPO解释：价格已定，但零售分配仍悬而未决
items.desc_en: Charles Schwab, Fidelity, Robinhood, SoFi and Morgan Stanley's E-Trade are among the brokerage platforms making SpaceX shares available.
items.desc_zh: 嘉信理财 (Charles Schwab)、富达 (Fidelity)、Robinhood、SoFi 和摩根士丹利 (Morgan Stanley) 的 E-Trade 等经纪平台均提供 SpaceX 股票。

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: Two reportedly killed as women take part in rare protest in Afghanistan
items.title_zh: 据报道，阿富汗妇女参加罕见抗议活动时造成两人死亡
items.desc_en: The demonstration, in the western city of Herat, was broken up after police are alleged to have opened fire.
items.desc_zh: 据称，警方开枪后，西部城市赫拉特的示威活动被驱散。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗警告停止袭击，以色列仍对黎巴嫩城市提尔发动空袭
items.desc_en: Iran warned Israel on Monday that it could resume hostilities if attacks on its Lebanese ally Hezbollah do not stop.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗周一警告以色列，如果不停止对其黎巴嫩盟友真主党的袭击，伊朗可能会恢复敌对行动。

items.title_en: Murder of Lyhanna, 11, enrages France and turns up heat on government
items.title_zh: 11 岁莱哈娜 (Lyhanna) 被杀激怒法国并激怒政府
items.desc_en: Protesters are angry that the suspect had already been reported to police last August in a separate case.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者对嫌疑人去年八月在另一起案件中向警方报案感到愤怒。

items.title_en: Axol
items.title_zh: Axol
items.desc_en: Automate physical work with a powerful robot
items.desc_zh: 使用强大的机器人自动化体力劳动

items.title_en: Zingle
items.title_zh: Zingle
items.desc_en: Learn words in context with AI
items.desc_zh: 通过人工智能学习上下文中的单词

items.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate
items.desc_en: Latest audio model for live speech-to-speech translation
items.desc_zh: 用于实时语音到语音翻译的最新音频模型

items.title_en: Kenyan police fire tear gas at protest against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚警方发射催泪瓦斯抗议美国埃博拉检疫中心计划
items.desc_en: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title_en: fort
items.title_zh: fort
items.desc_en: One command to audit and fix your Mac's security
items.desc_zh: 一个命令即可审核并修复 Mac 的安全性

items.title_zh: AGNT.Hub
items.desc_en: Build always-on AI agents without managing servers
items.desc_zh: 无需管理服务器即可构建始终在线的 AI 代理

items.title_en: BlenderHunt
items.title_zh: BlenderHunt
items.desc_en: The indie marketplace for Blender artists and creators
items.desc_zh: Blender 艺术家和创作者的独立市场

items.title_en: veridive
items.title_zh: veridive
items.desc_en: Find the 30 seconds that matter in any video via chat
items.desc_zh: 通过聊天找到任何视频中重要的 30 秒

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: OLO Robotics
items.title_zh: OLO Robotics
items.desc_en: Control robots in your browser — no setup needed
items.desc_zh: 在浏览器中控制机器人 - 无需设置

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: Screen Charm
items.title_zh: Screen Charm
items.desc_en: Give your screen recordings more charm
items.desc_zh: 让您的屏幕录制更具魅力

items.title_zh: iArt.ai
items.desc_en: Turn ideas & designs into stunning video/animation.
items.desc_zh: 将想法和设计转化为令人惊叹的视频/动画。

items.title_en: LayerProof Vellum
items.title_zh: LayerProof Vellum
items.desc_en: One canvas for every image asset you need
items.desc_zh: 一张画布可满足您所需的每种图像资源

items.title_en: Napkin Math
items.title_zh: Napkin Math
items.desc_en: personalized AI food journal + nutrition coach
items.desc_zh: 个性化AI美食日记+营养教练

items.title_en: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏
items.desc_en: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.
items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_en: TypingMind
items.title_zh: TypingMind
items.desc_en: Pay per use, no subscription, 18 model providers supported
items.desc_zh: 按使用付费，无需订阅，支持 18 个模型提供商

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Incorruptible by Eric Ries
items.title_zh: Incorruptible by Eric Ries
items.desc_en: Why good companies go bad and how great companies stay great
items.desc_zh: 为什么好公司会变坏，伟大的公司如何保持伟大

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.title_en: From Bitcoin to blockchain: Key cryptocurrency terms and what they mean
items.title_zh: 从比特币到区块链：关键的加密货币术语及其含义
items.desc_en: As the price of Bitcoin sinks once more, here's a guide to some of the trickiest crypto terms.
items.desc_zh: 随着比特币价格再次下跌，这里有一些最棘手的加密货币术语的指南。

items.desc_en: Run AI coding agents hands-free from a heads-up display
items.desc_zh: 通过平视显示器免提运行 AI 编码代理

items.desc_zh: 这家科技公司宣布推出新的 Majorana 2 芯片。

items.desc_zh: 解决所有渠道问题的人工智能代理

items.desc_en: The Publishing API for the Agent Era.
